exercises.code:
import numpy as np
montos = np.array([10, 12, 14, 16, 100], dtype=float)
print(len(montos), round(float(montos.mean()), 2), float(np.median(montos)))

import numpy as np
m = np.array([5, 8, 9, 10, 12, 13, 40], dtype=float)
q1, q3 = np.quantile(m, [0.25, 0.75])
print(round(float(q1), 2), round(float(q3), 2), round(float(q3 - q1), 2))

import numpy as np
x = np.array([10, 11, 12, 13, 100], dtype=float)
mu, med = float(x.mean()), float(np.median(x))
print(mu, med, round(mu / med, 2))

import numpy as np
x = np.array([2, 3, 4, 5, 100], dtype=float)
print(float(np.median(np.abs(x - np.median(x)))))

import numpy as np
print([round(float(v), 3) for v in np.log1p([0, 1, 9, 99])])

muestra = ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco", "Lima"]
print(round(muestra.count("Lima") / len(muestra), 2))
print(round(8 / 10 - 0.5, 2))

import math
print(round(1.96 * 2 / math.sqrt(16), 3))
print(round((13 - 10) / 2, 2))

diff, se = 4, 1.5
print((round(diff - 1.96 * se, 2), round(diff + 1.96 * se, 2)))

import numpy as np
print(round(float(np.corrcoef([1, 2, 3, 4], [2, 4, 6, 8])[0, 1]), 3))

import numpy as np
z = np.arange(5, dtype=float)
x = y = z.copy()
r_raw = float(np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1])
bx, by = np.polyfit(z, x, 1), np.polyfit(z, y, 1)
rx, ry = x - (bx[0] * z + bx[1]), y - (by[0] * z + by[1])
r_res = float(np.corrcoef(rx, ry)[0, 1]) if np.std(rx) > 0 and np.std(ry) > 0 else 0.0
if np.isnan(r_res):
    r_res = 0.0
print(round(r_raw, 3), round(r_res, 3))

import numpy as np
m = np.array([10, 12, 11, 13, 50], dtype=float)
q1, q3 = np.quantile(m, [0.25, 0.75])
print(int((m > q3 + 1.5 * (q3 - q1)).sum()))

regiones, flags = ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], [True, True, False]
lima = [f for r, f in zip(regiones, flags) if r == "Lima"]
print(sum(lima) / len(lima))

import numpy as np
m = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 100], dtype=float)
q1, q3 = np.quantile(m, [0.25, 0.75])
iqr = q3 - q1
print(((m < q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | (m > q3 + 1.5 * iqr)).tolist())

evidencia = {"pregunta": "¿Cuál es el ticket mediano?", "hipotesis": "mediana estable", "resultado": {"n": 10, "median": 5.0}}
print(evidencia["pregunta"])

def traza(pregunta, metrica, valor, limite):
    print("P", pregunta)
    print("M", metrica)
    print("V", valor)
    print("L", limite)
traza("ticket mediano", "median", 12.0, "web-only")
print({"n_raw": 5, "n_final": 4, "filtros": ["monto>0"]})

import hashlib
print(hashlib.sha1(b"a,b\n1,2\n").hexdigest()[:8])

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, 0.0, 2.0]})
print({"n_raw": len(df), "n_final": len(df[df["monto"] > 0]), "seed": 42})
